en: Unlock the Clinic (T1) to install attribute augments.
zh: 解锁义体诊所（T1）以安装属性强化。

en: Upgrade the Clinic to T2 to unlock the Max-HP augment.
zh: 升级义体诊所至 T2 以解锁生命强化。

en: Augment level cap is {cap}. Upgrade the Clinic to T3 to raise it to {high}.
zh: 强化等级上限为 {cap}。升级义体诊所至 T3 可提升至 {high}。

en: Augment level cap raised to {cap} (Clinic T3).
zh: 强化等级上限已提升至 {cap}（义体诊所 T3）。
